products.title: Moringa Instant Noodles (Murungai) 60g
products.description: Premium Moringa Instant Noodles loaded with nutrients, protein, and dietary fiber. A healthy alternative to regular noodles, crafted with pure organic moringa leaves.

products.title: Forest Honey (Malai Thean)
products.description: Pure, unadulterated Forest Honey collected from deep woods. Rich in antioxidants and natural enzymes, offering a robust and earthy flavor profile.

products.title: Desi Cow Ghee (Kangayamnattu)
products.description: Authentic Desi Cow Ghee prepared using the traditional Bilona method. Golden, aromatic, and packed with essential fatty acids for your daily health.

products.title: Black Rice Instant Noodles 60g
products.description: Delicious Black Rice Noodles (Karuppu Kavuni) rich in antioxidants and anthocyanins. Quick to cook and perfectly healthy for the whole family.

products.title: Organic Rose Gulkand
products.description: Traditional sweet preserve of rose petals. A natural coolant that aids digestion and rejuvenates the body with its exquisite floral aroma.

products.title: Foxtail Millet Noodles 60g
products.description: Healthy Foxtail Millet (Thinai) Noodles. Gluten-free, diabetic-friendly, and packed with complex carbohydrates for sustained energy.

products.title: Pearl Millet Semiya (Kambu) 250g
products.description: Nutritious Pearl Millet Vermicelli. Perfect for a healthy breakfast upma or sweet payasam. Rich in iron and highly digestible.

products.title: Special Forest Honey Combo
products.description: A curated combo of wild, multi-floral forest honey. The perfect organic gift pack for health enthusiasts.

products.title: Organic Basmati Rice (White)
products.description: Organic White Basmati rice is a long-grain, fragrant rice used in most traditional dishes. Known for its delicate aroma and fluffy texture.

products.title: Organic Arhar Dal
products.description: Organic Arhar Dal, popularly known as Toor dal, is one of the simplest dals. The best choice for families seeking pure nutrition.

products.title: Organic Basmati Rice (Brown)
products.description: Organic Brown Basmati Rice is a great source of protein, calcium and iron. A healthier, fiber-rich alternative to white rice.

products.title: Organic Black Pepper Powder
products.description: Organic Black Pepper packed with protein, iron and calcium. Adds a bold kick to any dish while boosting your immunity naturally.

products.title: Organic Turmeric Powder
products.description: Pure golden Turmeric Powder, stone-ground from organically grown turmeric roots. A powerful anti-inflammatory and antioxidant superfood.

products.title: Organic Red Chilli Powder
products.description: Vibrant, naturally dried red chilli powder with perfect heat and rich colour. Adds authentic spice to every meal without artificial additives.

products.title: Organic Jaggery Powder
products.description: Organic Jaggery Powder with no chemical additives, made from certified organic sugar cane. A golden-brown, highly nutritious natural sweetener.

products.title: Organic Jaggery
products.description: Organic Jaggery (Gud) directly from the farms of Gujarat. Unrefined, chemical-free, and prepared from hand-pressed organic sugarcane.

products.title: Organic Gram Flour
products.description: Organic Gram Flour made from Bengal gram (chana dal). Gluten-free and safe for individuals with celiac disease.

products.title: Organic Urad Whole
products.description: Premium whole urad dal, organically grown and sun-dried. Rich in protein and perfect for making authentic dal makhani.

products.title: Organic Moong (Whole)
products.description: Organic Moong Dal Whole is full of iron, calcium and protein. Light, easily digestible, and perfect for everyday cooking.

products.title: Organic Rajma Chitra
products.description: Organic Rajma Chitra full of iron, calcium and protein. These beautiful speckled beans make the perfect comfort meal.

products.title: Wild Honey (Kombu Thean)
products.description: Rare wild honey harvested from ancient forests. Known for its medicinal properties, deep amber colour, and complex, layered sweetness.

products.title: Moringa Honey
products.description: Single-origin Moringa Honey with the combined benefits of moringa and raw honey. An immunity powerhouse with a mild, sweet taste.

products.title: Organic Wheat Daliya
products.description: Wholesome organic broken wheat for healthy porridge and khichdi. High in fiber, easy to digest, and perfect for all ages.

products.title: Organic White Poha
products.description: Light, fluffy organic flattened rice for quick and nutritious breakfast. A staple of Indian kitchens made the pure way.
